title: senecio maeviae
intro: Senecio maeviae, also known as Groundsel, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and alkaloids. The health benefits of Groundsel include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of arthritis. Groundsel can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it due to its potential toxicity and interactions with other medications.
